seoTitle: Denham Court vs Denhams Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Denham Court and Denhams Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Denham Court vs Denhams Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Denham Court and Denhams Beach.
heading: Denham Court vs Denhams Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Denham Court, New South Wales and Denhams Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Denhams Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Denham Court (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Denham Court or Denhams Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Denham Court has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Denhams Beach scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Denham Court scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Denhams Beach scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Denham Court or Denhams Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Denhams Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.23% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
